description_long: This object depicts a construction worker in a dynamic, crouched or crawling pose, with limbs extended and bent at sharp angles. The figure is predominantly dressed in a light blue uniform, with visible folds and seams suggesting workwear. A yellow safety helmet is clearly visible on the head, and the hands and feet are exposed, with the right hand gripping an unseen object or surface. The shoes appear to be dark and sturdy, resembling work boots, and the overall form is elongated and somewhat distorted, possibly due to scanning artifacts. The surface texture is matte with some roughness, and the figure's proportions are exaggerated, giving it a stylized appearance.
description: A stylized construction worker in a light blue uniform and yellow safety helmet, posed in a dynamic, crouched position with visible work boots.
description_view_0: The construction worker's upper body, helmet, and bent right arm are prominent, with the blue uniform and helmet clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the outstretched right arm holding the helmet, and the elongated, bent legs with dark work boots.
description_view_2: The back and top of the figure are visible, showing the helmet and the angular, twisted posture of the body and limbs.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the lower body, with both legs and boots in clear view, and the helmeted head partially visible.
